sourceAmbiguity: NHS login claim contact details might look locally editable in a patient account screen.
decisionTaken: Marked NHS login claims as view-only and externally managed through NHS login.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: NHS login remains the identity claim authority and Vecells must not present itself as the claim editor.
operationalRisk: Patients may still expect an edit affordance if the account page resembles a profile editor.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add an outbound NHS login management affordance only after product/legal approval.
